task: Advanced high-value task: Quasi-Identifier Release Cell Causal Hypothesis Shortlist. Scenario: a governance team wants a reproducible analysis that another reviewer can rerun from the row data alone for quasi-identifier release cell. Embedded packet: Records: R1 cell_count=44 epsilon_requested=71 sensitive_field_count=5; R2 cell_count=53 epsilon_requested=67 sensitive_field_count=8; R3 cell_count=39 epsilon_requested=82 sensitive_field_count=4. Remediation options: O1 changes cell_count by -12% cost=78500; O2 changes epsilon_requested by -18% cost=96100; O3 changes sensitive_field_count by -25% cost=55900; max_budget=121200. Rules and constraints: cell_count<5 suppress; epsilon>1 requires privacy review; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: quantify the operational consequence of each exception and rank follow-up actions by urgency and evidentiary strength. Deliver privacy_release_2.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
